title: Map source-backed deliverable runtime gaps
goal: Classify the remaining Devpilot product/runtime gaps from docs, code, and current tests into implementation slices or external blockers before any new behavior work.
forbidden_scope: No schema, web, or provider changes.
acceptance: Each backlog item cites a document, code, test, review finding, or validation failure source.
Each item is classified as implementable slice, verification-only gap, or external blocker.
The next implementable write slice has exact allowed files and validation commands.
verification_commands: Scoped rg/safe-read only unless runtime evidence is required.
No noisy build required for this read-only classification slice.
